items.title: Department of Homeland Security Shuts Down, Though Essential Work Continues
items.description: Though funding for the department ran out early Saturday, officials said its essential functions would continue.

items.title: New U.S. Boat Strike Kills 3 in the Caribbean
items.description: The attacks since early November had specifically targeted suspected drug smuggling boats in the Pacific Ocean.

items.title: Pam Bondi’s ‘Cage Match’ and Trump’s Fraying Coalition
items.description: The round table reflects on a chaotic week of incompetence and meltdowns.
